creator: michaeal@gmail.com
text:
After updating ntfs-3g up to version 2009.2.1 I couldn't mount partition. All was ok with version 1.009

About my system
Code:
root@server [fusefs-ntfs]#uname -a
FreeBSD server 7.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE #0: Fri Jan 30 20:40:21 MSK 2009     root@server:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/TESTKERNEL  i386


ntfs-3g version
Code:
ntfs-3g --help
ntfs-3g 2009.2.1 external FUSE 27 - Third Generation NTFS Driver


Problem:
Code:
root@server [fusefs-ntfs]#ntfs-3g /dev/ad3s1 /media/media
mount_fusefs: -o nempty: option not supported
fuse: failed to mount file system: Unknown error: 0


Could you help?

How-To-Repeat: ntfs-3g /dev/ad3s1 /media/media
